---
title: "python-nix-template"
description: "A Python project template for Nix using uv2nix and flake-parts"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# python-nix-template

A Python project template for Nix using uv2nix and flake-parts

## Quick Start

[Get started with installation](guides/installation.qmd) or jump into the [tutorials](tutorials/getting-started.qmd).

## Features

- Modern Python development with UV and Nix
- Type-safe development with beartype
- Comprehensive testing with pytest
- Professional documentation with Quarto

## Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/sciexp/python-nix-template)
- [Installation Guide](guides/installation.qmd)
- [API Reference](reference/index.qmd)
